text.title: Fixed-Price vs T&M Change-Request Pricing Playbook Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Fixed-Price vs T&M Change-Request Pricing Playbook application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Each CR classified by contract type AND scope-delta direction (additive / substitutive / clarification).

rationale.source: Fixed-Price vs T&M Change-Request Pricing Playbook authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Mis-classified CRs misprice; contract-type × delta makes the decision auditable.

rule.statement: Absorb only if scope delta <X% of remaining contingency AND adds <Y hours total; thresholds pinned per engagement.

rationale.source: Fixed-Price vs T&M Change-Request Pricing Playbook authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Ad-hoc absorption erodes margin; explicit thresholds keep the BA honest.

rule.statement: Addendum CRs price residual risk explicitly (loading line items, not lump-sum padding).

rationale.source: Fixed-Price vs T&M Change-Request Pricing Playbook authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Lump-sum addendums get negotiated away; explicit line items defend.

rule.statement: Scope-swap CRs are symmetric in hours AND risk; asymmetric swaps require addendum.

rationale.source: Fixed-Price vs T&M Change-Request Pricing Playbook authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Asymmetric swaps leak margin disguised as zero-cost change.

rule.statement: Each CR signed off by a named BA + commercial co-owner; never single-person sign on >$5k impact.

rationale.source: Fixed-Price vs T&M Change-Request Pricing Playbook authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Single-person sign on material CRs is a failure mode; co-sign distributes risk.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.
